fullArticle:
Paris celebrates as France secures World Cup semi-final spot

Reporting from Paris, Al Jazeera’s Natacha Butler captures the electric atmosphere after France beat Morocco to reach the World Cup semi-finals. Fans of both teams filled a packed fan zone in Seine-Saint-Denis, home to a large French-Moroccan community....
